title: Your Inbox
drDigitalIntro:
Email is like sending a letter, but instantly.
• Your Inbox is where emails arrive; Sent holds emails you've sent.
• Drafts are emails you started but haven't sent.
• Spam is junk mail; Archive stores emails out of your Inbox. Let's explore!

playgroundTask.goal: You explored your inbox and read emails

steps.say: Click on the email from Mom to read it.
Now click on the email from Dr. Digital.
Click Inbox in the sidebar to go back to all emails.

drDigitalSuccess: You opened and read emails like a pro! Your Inbox is the starting point for all email communication.
drDigitalHint: Click on an email in the list to open and read it. Then click Inbox in the left sidebar.
